hyperedges.label: MySQL Infrastructure Across Environments (CI, Local, Production)

nodes.label: Development Rules
nodes.rationale: Domain model must stay framework-independent; DTOs use MapStruct; API docs must be updated when behavior changes so FE stays in sync.

nodes.label: No Automated Testing Rule
nodes.rationale: Project explicitly forbids generating/running tests, likely to keep development tasks fast/scoped for this assignment context.

nodes.label: JWT Authentication (access/refresh token)
nodes.rationale: Access token deliberately short-lived (5 min) requiring FE to implement automatic refresh-on-401; refresh token persisted in DB so it can be revoked on logout.

nodes.label: Resume API Endpoints (/api/resumes)
nodes.rationale: Deliberately lacks ownership checks per doc: candidateId taken from body/path not token.

nodes.label: Application Status State Machine
nodes.rationale: Enforces one-directional pipeline (APPLICATION_CREATED→SCREENING→INTERVIEW→OFFER→HIRED, or →REJECTED/WITHDRAWN at any open stage) with no state-machine bypass, even for admins.

nodes.label: Ownership Access Returns 404 Not 403
nodes.rationale: Deliberate design choice: accessing another user's application/job/company returns 404 identical to not-found, to avoid confirming the existence of records the caller doesn't own.

nodes.label: Applications Junction Table (Candidate x Job)
nodes.rationale: applications table resolves the candidate-job many-to-many relationship into two one-to-many relationships and tracks each application's current recruitment stage.

hyperedges.label: MySQL Infrastructure Across Environments (CI, Local, Production)
